news.title:

news.title:
State-owned IOC, BPCL, and HPCL face ₹18/litre loss on petrol, ₹35/litre on diesel due to price freeze.
Macquarie warns of likely retail price hikes post state elections; crude price rise hits OMC earnings visibility.
news.summary:
State-owned IOC, BPCL, and HPCL face ₹18/litre loss on petrol, ₹35/litre on diesel due to price freeze.

news.title:
OMCs like BPCL, HPCL, and IOC face Q4 FY26 profit pressures due to higher fuel losses and LPG under-recoveries, despite strong GRMs.
Analysts favor BPCL for risk-reward, IOC for stability, and upgraded HPCL for operational gains and project completions.
news.summary:
OMCs like BPCL, HPCL, and IOC face Q4 FY26 profit pressures due to higher fuel losses and LPG under-recoveries, despite strong GRMs.
Analysts favor BPCL for risk-reward, IOC for stability, and upgraded HPCL for operational gains and project completions.

news.title:
OMC stocks like HPCL, BPCL, and IOCL dropped up to 6% as crude surged past $105/barrel due to Hormuz blockade fears.
Sensex plunged over 1,000 points, Nifty fell below 23,750 as geopolitical tensions escalated, pressuring energy sector stocks.
news.summary:
OMC stocks like HPCL, BPCL, and IOCL dropped up to 6% as crude surged past $105/barrel due to Hormuz blockade fears.
Sensex plunged over 1,000 points, Nifty fell below 23,750 as geopolitical tensions escalated, pressuring energy sector stocks.

news.title:
